name: Command Centre Dashboard
label: Dashboard
summary: Dashboard is rewired away from Command Centre agent snapshots. Manual project status JSON is the current operating model; hooks are deliberately deferred.
blockers: Project-owned BTS/NBHW status file paths need to be agreed before automation.
nextActions: Do not reintroduce public/snapshot.json or agent branch snapshots.
Keep the existing dashboard layout and page sequence intact unless Adam explicitly approves future layout work.

items.title: Update BTS manual status after SiteGround captcha/access is cleared.
Agree NBHW project-owned status export fields before wiring hooks.
